description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On May 10, 2025 at 2:13 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a collision 
involving a van on Broadway near Stockton Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling westbound on Broadway in the rightmost lane, slowing for a queue of traffic ahead. A van approached the 
Waymo AV from behind, and the front of the van made contact with the rear of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo 
AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage. The passenger in the Waymo AV alleged a 
minor injury.
Print
Clear Form
